speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need all of you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to re-cast Mage Hand and pick up the bucket of tar.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It rolls across the way and disappears into the other chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stealthily move forward, back where I was across from Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jesus Christ. This just got really--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have an interesting idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott, where do you want to go?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Towards the narrower hallway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just on the edge of it. Do I hear any movement or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do hear the same object shifting on the other side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott, as you're there at the edge, and Beau's there. You glance in, now that you guys are close enough you can see shifting in there. You pay attention and you can see this other chamber is open with another cell off to the side. It slams into that door, spins around, and one of the lenses peeks around the corner right at where Beau had just moved into the far corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Jester is going to cast her Spiritual Weapon and put it right in the center of--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The room?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. A big nice shiny object to distract.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where's Fjord going? Because we're about to go into combat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Are we all pulling against the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where is Fjord going? Make Fjord go by the gate, maybe. Back a bit. Then Beau is going to take out those ball bearings.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can we put Jester in the corner?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester can back up there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's not kill our friends’ D&D characters.
